title: BioResearch Agent Framework
description: Executable biomedical workflows for AI assistants — literature analysis, biomarker discovery, and Mendelian randomization through reproducible agent skills. 14 skills, 9 validation cases, 23 benchmark tasks, 17 pytest tests. Pluggable evidence scoring, hard quality control, resumable runs, and explicit negative results.

creators.name: Tudiyusufu, Alimujiang
creators.affiliation: Institute of Basic Medical Sciences, Peking Union Medical College
